title: Euphonic Sessions with Kyau & Albert - January 2023
description:
01 Marsh ft. Leo Wood - Blue [Anjunadeep]
02 Kyau & Albert - Kiksu  (Boss Axis Remix) [Euphonic]
03 Eelke Kleijn - Control [DAYS like NIGHTS]
04 Kyau & Albert - Follow The Waves  (Heard Right Remix) [Euphonic]
05 BT - Mercury & Solace (Helsloot Remix) [Black Hole] [TRACK OF THE MONTH]
06 Ronski Speed & DJ T.H. pres. Sun Decade & Linnea Schssow - Searching In Your Soul [Anjunabeats]
07 John Grand - United [Euphonic]
08 Daniel Portman - Night & Day (Club Mix) [Sirup Music]
09 Tiesto Solardo ft. Poppy Baskcomb- I Cant Wait [Musical Freedom]
10 Between Us - Sonnar [Armind]
11 Rodrigo Deem & Sirolf - All I See [Enprog]
12 Lostep  - Burma (aname AM Remix) [Anjunabeats]
13 Will Atkinson - Last Night In Ibiza (Filterheadz Remix) [Black Hole]
14 Mike EFEX - Visions In The Dark [Coldharbour Black]
15 Souls In Motion ft. DIMS - Letters From The Sun [Big Toys]
16 Matan Caspi - Some Kind Of Way (Alfonso Muchacho Remix) [Freegrant Music]
17 A.M.R - Sailor's Cry (djimboh Remix) [Monstercat Silk]
18 Andy Duguid ft. Leah - Don't Belong (Burkhanov Remix) [Black Hole]
19 Grum ft. Able Joseph - Be The Horizon (Fehrplay Remix) [Anjunabeats]
20 Tritonal & Susie Ledge - Keep My Dreams Alive (Hessian Remix) [Enhanced]
21 Ezequiel Arias - Arcoiris [Odd One Out] 
22 Scorz & Silvio Soul - Laroc [Armada]
23 Above & Beyond and aname ft. Marty Longstaff - Gratitude (Oliver Smith Remix) [Anjunabeats]
24 The Prizoners - Uranio [Sirup Music]
25 Laurent Wolf ft. Eric Carter - No Stress (Stereoclip Remix) [Armada]
26 Minicied - Odyssey [Emergent Cities]
